nodes.label: GeneratorViewModelTest.kt
GeneratorViewModelTest
.setup()

.`initial state should be correct when there is no saved state`()
.`initial state should be correct when there is a saved state`()
.`initial state should be correct for username modal`()
.`initial state should be correct for passcode modal`()
.`activePolicyFlow changes should update state`()
.`CloseClick should emit NavigateBack event`()

.`RegenerateClick action for password state sends ShowSnackbar event on password generation failure`()
.`RegenerateClick action for passphrase state updates generatedText and saves passphrase generation options on successful passphrase generation`()
.`RegenerateClick action for passphrase state sends ShowSnackbar event on passphrase generation failure`()
.`RegenerateClick for plus addressed email state should update the plus addressed email correctly`()

.`RegenerateClick for random word username state should update the random word username correctly`()
.`CopyClick should call setText on ClipboardManager and register generator action`()
.`Policy should overwrite password options if stricter`()
.`Policy should overwrite passphrase options if stricter`()
.`Policy should overwrite passwordType if has overridePasswordType`()

.`MainTypeOptionSelect shouldn't update the state if its already selected`()
.`MainTypeOptionSelect PASSWORD should switch to Passcode`()

.`UsernameTypeOptionSelect RANDOM_WORD should switch to RandomWord type`()
.`TooltipClick should emit NavigateToTooltip event`()
.`LifecycleResumedAction should use storage options derived state over VM state`()

.`No loadOptions with default arguments should use VM state options derived state over VM state`()
